title: QrHeroSection
description: QR activation hero: dark scan-themed hero with animated grid, neon scan beam, corner reticles, a pulsing status tag, a two-line uppercase H1 (line 2 in neon), lead copy, and up to two CTAs. Built for post-purchase QR landing pages (/l/my-qr-zone). This file is the SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for the section's shape - the TS type is generated from it (QrHero.types.ts) and the landing-page doc schema $refs it.

tag.description: Pulsing status pill above the H1, e.g. 'Post-Purchase Activation Hub'.

headline.description: H1 line one, e.g. 'You scanned it.'

headlineAccent.description: H1 line two, rendered in neon on its own line, e.g. "Let's grow."

primaryCta.description: Neon button. Label from the approved CTA library, ALL-CAPS applied by CSS.
